About Us

Rooted in Faith, Built for Excellence

St Paul's Amandlethu AMR High School is a Roman Catholic boarding secondary school located at St Paul's Mission in Lupane District, Matabeleland North Province, Zimbabwe.

The school belongs to the AMR Group of Schools and follows the ZIMSEC curriculum. We are committed to producing academically excellent, disciplined and responsible citizens through Christian values, quality education, innovation and practical learning.

Students are equipped with both academic knowledge and practical life skills through classroom learning, agriculture, leadership programmes, sports and community service.

Our Direction

Vision & Mission

🎯

Our Vision

To become one of Zimbabwe's leading centres of excellence in education, leadership and innovation — producing graduates who serve God, community and nation with distinction.

📖

Our Mission

To provide holistic education rooted in Christian values while nurturing academic excellence, discipline, integrity and practical life skills that prepare students for a rapidly changing world.

Why St Paul's

Why Choose Us

We build complete human beings — academically excellent, morally grounded and practically skilled.

Academic Excellence

Consistent top results in ZIMSEC examinations driven by dedicated teachers and a rigorous academic culture.

Qualified Teachers

Experienced, passionate and professionally trained educators committed to every student's growth.

Christian Values

A faith-centered environment that shapes character, builds integrity and nurtures young people of purpose.

Boarding Facilities

Safe, comfortable and well-supervised boarding hostels providing a structured environment for academic focus.

Modern Learning

Science labs, computer lab and a well-stocked library supporting hands-on, technology-enhanced learning.

Agricultural Innovation

Real farming projects — poultry, fish, cattle, goats, crops — giving students entrepreneurship skills for life.

Sports Excellence

Competitive sports programmes developing discipline, teamwork, fitness and national representation.

Leadership Development

Student leadership programmes, clubs and community service preparing future leaders of Zimbabwe.

Safe Environment

A secure, well-monitored campus where every student feels protected, valued and free to learn.

Community Service

Regular outreach programmes instilling a spirit of giving back and responsibility to the wider community.

Learning

A rich ZIMSEC curriculum across Sciences, Commercials, Arts and Languages — equipping every student for their chosen future.

Practical Learning

Agriculture & Entrepreneurship

One of the most comprehensive agriculture programmes in Matabeleland North — equipping students with real farming and entrepreneurship skills that last a lifetime.

🐓🐔🐣

Poultry Farming

Students manage a commercial poultry operation learning feeding, health management, production cycles and business record keeping.

Practical Training
🐟🐠

Fish Farming

Modern fish ponds teaching students aquaculture techniques, water management, feeding regimes and fish marketing.

Innovation
🐷

Piggery

A thriving pig project giving students hands-on experience in swine production, nutrition and farm business management.

Enterprise Skills
🐐

Goat Farming

Students learn small livestock management including breeding, nutrition, disease control and marketing of goat products.

Livestock
🐄

Cattle Rearing

A cattle project teaching large livestock management, dairy and beef production principles and farm economics.

Livestock
🌽🌻🌿

Crop and Vegetable Farming

Field crop production and vegetable gardening teaching soil preparation, planting, irrigation and post-harvest handling.

Crop Production
Student Life

Boarding Life

More than just accommodation — a complete living and learning community designed for student growth and wellbeing.

🏠

Comfortable Hostels

Separate, well-maintained boys and girls hostels providing a safe and comfortable home away from home.

🍽️

Healthy Meals

Nutritious, balanced meals served daily in our dining hall — fuelling young minds and bodies for peak performance.

📖

Structured Study Time

Dedicated supervised study periods every evening ensuring students maintain strong academic habits and consistency.

✝️

Christian Worship

Daily prayers, weekly chapel services and spiritual formation activities nurturing the faith and character of every student.

🛡️

Safe Environment

24-hour supervision with trained house parents ensuring every student is safe, supported and accounted for.

💙

Student Welfare

Counselling services, medical care and pastoral support ensuring the physical, emotional and spiritual wellbeing of all boarders.

Join Us

Admissions 2025

We welcome applications from motivated students ready to embrace academic excellence, Christian values and practical learning.

01
🏫

Form One Entry

  • Grade 7 Certificate
  • Good academic record
  • Birth certificate copy
  • Recommendation letter
  • Medical certificate
  • Completed application form
02
🎓

Lower Sixth Entry

  • O Level certificate
  • Minimum 5 passes including English
  • Relevant subject passes for chosen stream
  • Character reference letter
  • Birth certificate copy
03
🛏️

Boarding Admissions

  • Available for all enrolled students
  • Separate boys and girls hostels
  • Full board — meals included
  • Medical and counselling support
  • Supervised study time daily

For enquiries and application forms contact the school office directly

Call School Office WhatsApp Us Send Email
